# enot

> An earthy color scheme for lightline, Midnight Commander, ranger,
> Telegram Desktop, vim / neovim and WezTerm: dark and light themes,
> gruvbox character, built in CIELAB and machine-checked to stay
> distinguishable under color blindness - minimum pairwise CIEDE2000
> of 8.2 between syntax accents and 7.2 across the 16 ANSI colors,
> verified against simulated protanopia and deuteranopia.

The name is the Russian word for raccoon; every color is generated by
an optimizer, none are hand-picked. Dichromacy is simulated with
Vienot 1999 and Brettel 1997 matrices in linear sRGB; a regression
gate fails the build if any guarantee drops.

## Scheme files

- [enot.vim](https://enot-theme.github.io/lightline/enot.vim): lightline
- [enot-dark-16M.ini](https://enot-theme.github.io/mc/enot-dark-16M.ini): Midnight Commander
- [enot-dark256.ini](https://enot-theme.github.io/mc/enot-dark256.ini): Midnight Commander
- [enot-light-16M.ini](https://enot-theme.github.io/mc/enot-light-16M.ini): Midnight Commander
- [enot-light256.ini](https://enot-theme.github.io/mc/enot-light256.ini): Midnight Commander
- [enot.py](https://enot-theme.github.io/ranger/enot.py): ranger
- [enot-dark.tdesktop-theme](https://enot-theme.github.io/telegram/enot-dark.tdesktop-theme): Telegram Desktop, dark theme
- [enot-light.tdesktop-theme](https://enot-theme.github.io/telegram/enot-light.tdesktop-theme): Telegram Desktop, light theme
- [enot.vim](https://enot-theme.github.io/vim/enot.vim): vim / neovim
- [enot-dark.toml](https://enot-theme.github.io/wezterm/enot-dark.toml): WezTerm, dark theme
- [enot-light.toml](https://enot-theme.github.io/wezterm/enot-light.toml): WezTerm, light theme
- [colors.json](https://enot-theme.github.io/colors.json): the color spec - roles at three depths
  (true color, xterm-256, ANSI 16) with measured invariant metrics

## Documentation

- [Install for lightline](https://enot-theme.github.io/lightline/)
- [Install for Midnight Commander](https://enot-theme.github.io/mc/)
- [Install for ranger](https://enot-theme.github.io/ranger/)
- [Install for Telegram Desktop](https://enot-theme.github.io/telegram/)
- [Install for vim / neovim](https://enot-theme.github.io/vim/)
- [Install for WezTerm](https://enot-theme.github.io/wezterm/)
- [Applications and coverage](https://enot-theme.github.io/apps/)
- [All install targets](https://enot-theme.github.io/get/)
- [Why warm themes collapse under color blindness](https://enot-theme.github.io/why/)
- [Measured guarantees and regression gates](https://enot-theme.github.io/numbers/)
- [Method: how the palette is optimized](https://enot-theme.github.io/method/)
- [Published sources](https://enot-theme.github.io/science/)
- [Homepage with live dichromacy simulation](https://enot-theme.github.io/)

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://enot-theme.github.io/llms-full.txt): full documentation and all palette values
